expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: search box selector dropdown planning covers OK or Cancel confirmation, pending selection, and dismissal outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the focus is restated and scenarios explicitly cover: “OK confirms selection”, “Cancel discards pending selection”, “Dismissal outside the popover does not incorrectly commit pending selection”, plus pending/loading cases (“Popover must not dismiss unexpectedly while selection is loading/pending”, “OK behavior when selection is still pending/loading”, “Cancel behavior during pending/loading”) and dismissal variants (Esc, focus loss).

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is titled “Phase 4a (advisory)” and frames the deliverable as “Phase 4a subcategory-only scenario coverage”. It also asserts Phase 4a contract compliance: “subcategory-first” and “does not introduce canonical top-level categories (per Phase 4a forbidden structure rules)”, and scenarios are written as nested action chains with observable verification leaves.
